title: Bad hints about table names
description:
### Company or project name
ClickHouse
### Describe what's wrong
```
milovidov@milovidov-pc:~/work/ClickHouse/tests/queries/0_stateless$ chc 03776_bad_rewrite_random_order_by.sql > 03776_bad_rewrite_random_order_by.reference
Received exception from server (version 26.1.1):
Code: 253. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Replica /clickhouse/tables/default/join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated/replicas/r1 already exists. (REPLICA_ALREADY_EXISTS)
(query: CREATE TABLE join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated (`id` UUID, `key` String, `number` Int64, `value1` String, `value2` String, `time` Nullable(Int64)) ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{database}/join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated', 'r1') ORDER BY (id, number, key) SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;)
milovidov@milovidov-pc:~/work/ClickHouse/tests/queries/0_stateless$ chc
ClickHouse client version 26.1.1.1.
Connecting to localhost:9000 as user default.
Connected to ClickHouse server version 26.1.1.
Warnings:
* Delay accounting is not enabled, OSIOWaitMicroseconds will not be gathered. You can enable it using `sudo sh -c 'echo 1 > /proc/sys/kernel/task_delayacct'` or by using sysctl.
milovidov-pc :) DROP TABLE join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated
DROP TABLE join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated
Query id: e14b0547-496a-4bea-8795-1227a4507d46
Elapsed: 0.033 sec.
Received exception from server (version 26.1.1):
Code: 60. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Table default.join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated does not exist. Maybe you meant default.join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated?. (UNKNOWN_TABLE)
milovidov-pc :) DROP TABLE default.join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated
DROP TABLE default.join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated
Query id: 80678ed4-c0b1-4e88-ab3e-87da14b85348
Elapsed: 0.002 sec.
Received exception from server (version 26.1.1):
Code: 60. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Table default.join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated does not exist. Maybe you meant default.join_inner_table__fuzz_146_replicated?. (UNKNOWN_TABLE)
```
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
.
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace

### Additional context

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE join_inner_table__fuzz_147_replicated (id UUID, key VARCHAR(255), number INTEGER, value1 VARCHAR(255), value2 VARCHAR(255), time INTEGER NULL);
INSERT INTO join_inner_table__fuzz_147_replicated (id, key, number, value1, value2, time) VALUES (UUID(), 'test_key', 42, 'value1', 'value2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM join_inner_table__fuzz_147_replicated WHERE time IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Creating a table with an existing replica name
